failedAssertions.reason: The env-style secret probe redacted the command-line assignment itself, but the fake `OPENAI_API_KEY` value still appeared verbatim in both the completed tool-output block and a settled `[text]` transcript block.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Real TUI evidence confirms keyboard scrolling away from the live bottom and a visible `newer lines below` indicator during active and finalized transcript growth, but neither the earlier same-day follow-live rerun nor the fresh rerun produced a conclusive same-session capture of that indicator clearing after returning to live bottom.
